name: SprintFlint
description: Opinionated sprint tracker for small dev teams. Remote MCP server at `https://mcp.sprintflint.com` (streamable HTTP, bearer-token auth) lets Claude/Cursor/Claude Code/Zed read and update tickets, sprints, comments, and velocity. Listed on the official MCP Registry as `io.github.neoflintai/sprintflint`. Free tier 300 tickets, no card.
